description: Configure a new client project portfolio by creating a customer named 'Nebula Stream' (description: 'Enterprise streaming solutions provider') and an associated project named 'Legacy System Migration' (description: 'Migrating COBOL mainframes to cloud infrastructure'). Assign the current user (Admin User) as the Project Admin and include the activities 'Code Analysis' and 'Data Transfer' for this project.

metadata.project_desc: Migrating COBOL mainframes to cloud infrastructure
